remember: Students will be able to recall and describe the key features and effects of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation.
Students will be able to list and explain the benefits and limitations of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concepts of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation in the context of the Indian economy.
Students will be able to describe the role of the government in promoting Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation in India.
apply: Students will be able to evaluate the impact of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation on different sections of the Indian society.
Students will be able to suggest ways to promote the benefits of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation while minimizing their negative effects.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the causes and consequences of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation in the Indian economy.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the effects of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation on different sectors of the economy.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation and their impact on the Indian economy.
Discuss the role of the government in promoting Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation in India.
Analyze the benefits and limitations of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation in the Indian context.
board_exam_objectives: Describe the key features and effects of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation in the Indian economy.
Explain the impact of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation on the Indian society and economy.
Compare and contrast the effects of Liberalisation, Privatisation, and Globalisation on different sectors of the economy.
